items.title: Want to Invest Like Michael Burry? 3 Stocks to Sell Now.
items.description: Michael Burry is questioning the AI spending spree by the tech giants. Should investors be trimming their positions on these popular names now?

items.title: Wabtec, Progress Rail settle anti-trust lawsuit
items.description: Wabtec and Progress Rail settle a lawsuit alleging anti-competitive behavior in the rail locomotive market. The post Wabtec, Progress Rail settle anti-trust lawsuit appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: PMI Rises in February, Marking Second Month of U.S. Manufacturing Growth

items.title: Caterpillar Expands Mining Software As Record Backlog And Rail Deal Reshape Risks
items.description: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) confirmed the acquisition of RPMGlobal Holdings Limited, expanding its mining software and technology capabilities. The company reported record fourth quarter sales and a record order backlog. Caterpillar highlighted strong demand for power solutions used in data centers. Subsidiary Progress Rail settled a major legal dispute, reducing legal uncertainty around its rail operations. items.title: Mining Automation Industry Research Report 2026-2035: A $6.36 Billion Market with Hexagon, Rockwell Automation, Komatsu, Rio Tinto Group, Sandvik, Caterpillar Leading
items.description: Key market opportunities in mining automation include rising demand for fully autonomous mines, the integration of AI and real-time analytics, and advancements in robotics for safety and efficiency. Asia-Pacific leads the market, driven by growing mineral activities and technology adoption.
